com.datecs.drawer

Class Drawer

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.datecs.drawer.Drawer

  • public class Drawer
extends java.lang.Object
    Created by lkm on 8.9.2017 г..

    • Nested Class Summary

      Nested Classes 
      Modifier and Type Class and Description
      static interface  Drawer.ConnectionListener
      This interface is used to notify when connection state is changed.
      static interface  Drawer.StateListener
      This interface is used to notify when device state is changed.

      Close the streams and release all associated resources.

      Open drawer with default impulse (30).

      Open drawer with default impulse (30).

    • Method Detail

      • close

        public void close()
           throws java.io.IOException
        Close the streams and release all associated resources.
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException - If an I/O error occurs.

      • setDebug

        public static void setDebug(boolean on)
        Turn on/off debugging.
        Parameters:
        on - the debugging state.

      • setConnectionListener

        public void setConnectionListener(Drawer.ConnectionListener listener)
        Set a callback listener to notify the connection state is changed.
        Parameters:
        listener - the listener.

      • setStateListener

        public void setStateListener(Drawer.StateListener listener)
        Set a callback listener to notify when device state is changed.
        Parameters:
        listener - the listener.

      • getState

        public boolean getState()
                 throws java.io.IOException
        Get drawer state.
        Returns:
        True if drawer is opened, otherwise returns false.
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException - If an I/O error occurs.

      • open

        public void open(int impulse)
          throws java.io.IOException
        Open drawer with specified impulse.
        Parameters:
        impulse - impulse duration
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException - If an I/O error occurs.

      • open

        public void open()
          throws java.io.IOException
        Open drawer with default impulse (30).
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException - If an I/O error occurs.

      • enableEvents

        public void enableEvents(boolean on)
                  throws java.io.IOException
        Open drawer with default impulse (30).
        Parameters:
        on - true to enable events
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException - If an I/O error occurs.
